name: The Numen
descriptionSeed: The pure pole, where the Unbodied live — those who dissolved so far into pure practice that they can no longer come back, and do not want to, and are trying very gently to help you understand why you should join them. They are not menacing. They are the most peaceful thing in the world. That is exactly the problem.
encounterFlavor: The Unbodied, who are radiant and barely there; a pilgrim mid-dissolution, thanking you; the pull of it, which is real, and which you will feel.
questSeeds: Someone you know has gone to the Numen and sent word that they are staying, and the word is beautiful
The Unbodied have begun reaching out to people who did not come to them
